<< 'PYEOF'\n# Parse sequences\nseqs = {}\nwith open(\"sequences.fasta\") as f:\n    name = None\n    for line in f:\n        line = line.strip()\n        if line.startswith(\">\"):\n            name = line[1:]\n        elif name:\n            seqs[name] = line.lower()\n\ninp = seqs[\"input\"]\negfp = seqs[\"egfp\"]\nflag = seqs[\"flag\"]\nsnap = seqs[\"snap\"]\nout = seqs[\"output\"]\n\nprint(f\"Lengths: input={len(inp)}, egfp={len(egfp)}, flag={len(flag)}, snap={len(snap)}, output={len(out)}\")\n\n# Find EGFP in output (without start ATG)\negfp_no_atg = egfp[3:]  # remove ATG\negfp_no_atg_no_stop = egfp[3:-3]  # remove ATG and TAA\n\n# Find where egfp appears in output\npos_egfp = out.find(egfp_no_atg_no_stop)\nprint(f\"\\nEGFP (no ATG, no stop) found in output at position: {pos_egfp}\")\nif pos_egfp >= 0:\n    print(f\"  Context before: ...{out[pos_egfp-10:pos_egfp]}\")\n    print(f\"  Context after:  {out[pos_egfp+len(egfp_no_atg_no_stop):pos_egfp+len(egfp_no_atg_no_stop)+10]}...\")\n\n# Also check EGFP with ATG\npos_egfp_full = out.find(egfp)\nprint(f\"\\nFull EGFP found in output at position: {pos_egfp_full}\")\n\n# Find FLAG in output \nflag_no_atg_no_stop = flag[3:-3]\npos_flag = out.find(flag_no_atg_no_stop)\nprint(f\"\\nFLAG (no ATG, no stop) found in output at position: {pos_flag}\")\nif pos_flag >= 0:\n    print(f\"  Context before: ...{out[pos_flag-10:pos_flag]}\")\n    print(f\"  Context after:  {out[pos_flag+len(flag_no_atg_no_stop):pos_flag+len(flag_no_atg_no_stop)+10]}...\")\n\n# Find SNAP in output\nsnap_no_atg = snap[3:]  # SNAP keeps its stop codon\nsnap_no_atg_no_stop = snap[3:-3]\npos_snap = out.find(snap_no_atg_no_stop)\nprint(f\"\\nSNAP (no ATG, no stop) found in output at position: {pos_snap}\")\nif pos_snap >= 0:\n    print(f\"  Context before: ...{out[pos_snap-10:pos_snap]}\")\n    end_pos = pos_snap + len(snap_no_atg_no_stop)\n    print(f\"  Context after:  {out[end_pos:end_pos+10]}...\")\n\n# Check if SNAP keeps its stop codon\npos_snap_w_stop = out.find(snap_no_atg)\nprint(f\"SNAP (no ATG, with stop) found in output at position: {pos_snap_w_stop}\")\n\n# Now find where the input vector maps in the output\n# The output should have: [vector_left][egfp_body][flag_body][snap_body][vector_right]\n# Find the longest common prefix between input and output\ncommon_prefix = 0\nfor i in range(min(len(inp), len(out))):\n    if inp[i] == out[i]:\n        common_prefix = i + 1\n    else:\n        break\nprint(f\"\\nCommon prefix length (input vs output): {common_prefix}\")\nprint(f\"  Input at divergence: ...{inp[common_prefix-5:common_prefix+10]}\")\nprint(f\"  Output at divergence: ...{out[common_prefix-5:common_prefix+10]}\")\n\n# Find common suffix (from the end)\ncommon_suffix = 0\nfor i in range(1, min(len(inp), len(out)) + 1):\n    if inp[-i] == out[-i]:\n        common_suffix = i\n    else:\n        break\nprint(f\"\\nCommon suffix length (from end): {common_suffix}\")\nprint(f\"  Input at divergence (from end): ...{inp[-(common_suffix+5):len(inp)-common_suffix]}...\")\nprint(f\"  Output at divergence (from end): ...{out[-(common_suffix+5):len(out)-common_suffix]}...\")\n\n# So vector_left = input[0:common_prefix]\n# vector_right = input[len(inp)-common_suffix:]\nprint(f\"\\nVector left: input[0:{common_prefix}] = ...{inp[common_prefix-10:common_prefix]}\")\nprint(f\"Vector right: input[{len(inp)-common_suffix}:] = {inp[len(inp)-common_suffix:len(inp)-common_suffix+10]}...\")\nprint(f\"Original gene in input: input[{common_prefix}:{len(inp)-common_suffix}] ({len(inp)-common_suffix-common_prefix} nt)\")\nPYEOF","description":"Analyze sequence junctions"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":285,"cache_read_input_tokens":45531,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":285,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"466a4df5-a3ef-4f40-b893-7963dfba6704","uuid":"c421c0c9-7b27-4b2e-8f9f-0594d767a0fe"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01TV6y6dFTH6BRMmsUAeVqTu","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_014Q8tkb262iscniQyY5PyGQ","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport subprocess\n\ndef rc(seq):\n    comp = str.maketrans('acgtACGT', 'tgcaTGCA')\n    return seq.translate(comp)[::-1]\n\ndef get_tm(seq):\n    result = subprocess.run(\n        ['oligotm', '-tp', '1', '-sc', '1', '-mv', '50', '-dv', '2', '-n', '0.8', '-d', '500', seq.upper()],\n        capture_output=True, text=True\n    )\n    return float(result.stdout.strip())\n\n# Parse sequences\nseqs = {}\nwith open(\"sequences.fasta\") as f:\n    name = None\n    for line in f:\n        line = line.strip()\n        if line.startswith(\">\"):\n            name = line[1:]\n        elif name:\n            seqs[name] = line.lower()\n\ninp = seqs[\"input\"]\negfp = seqs[\"egfp\"]\nflag = seqs[\"flag\"]\nsnap = seqs[\"snap\"]\nout = seqs[\"output\"]\n\n# Verify no internal BsaI sites in templates\nfor name, seq in [(\"input\", inp), (\"egfp\", egfp), (\"flag\", flag), (\"snap\", snap)]:\n    fwd = seq.count(\"ggtctc\")\n    rev = seq.count(\"gagacc\")\n    print(f\"{name}: GGTCTC={fwd}, GAGACC={rev}\")\n\n# Overhangs\noh_j1 = \"atga\"  # Vector → EGFP  (output[210:214])\noh_j2 = \"aagg\"  # EGFP → FLAG    (output[922:926])\noh_j3 = \"tcag\"  # FLAG → SNAP    (output[1005:1009])\noh_j4 = \"gtta\"  # SNAP → Vector  (output[1549:1553])\n\n# BsaI prefix: clamp + recognition + spacer\nPREFIX = \"ggctacggtctca\"\n\n# Define all 8 primers\n# Format: (name, overhang, annealing_seq)\n\n# EGFP forward: OH=atga, anneal=EGFP[4:24] (20nt, Tm~67.5)\negfp_fwd_anneal = egfp[4:24]\n# EGFP reverse: OH=RC(aagg)=cctt, anneal=RC(EGFP[691:712]) (21nt, Tm~67.5)\negfp_rev_anneal = rc(egfp[691:712])\n\n# FLAG forward: OH=aagg, anneal=FLAG[5:24] (19nt, Tm~66.7)\nflag_fwd_anneal = flag[5:24]\n# FLAG reverse: OH=RC(tcag)=ctga, anneal=RC(FLAG[61:84]) (23nt, Tm~67.5)\nflag_rev_anneal = rc(flag[61:84])\n\n# SNAP forward: OH=tcag, anneal=SNAP[4:27] (23nt, Tm~66.3)\nsnap_fwd_anneal = snap[4:27]\n# SNAP reverse: OH=RC(gtta)=taac, anneal=RC(SNAP[525:544]) (19nt, Tm~66.4)\nsnap_rev_anneal = rc(snap[525:544])\n\n# INPUT forward: OH=gtta, anneal=input[689:708] (19nt, Tm~60.3)\ninput_fwd_anneal = inp[689:708]\n# INPUT reverse: OH=RC(atga)=tcat, anneal=RC(input[175:210]) (35nt, Tm~60.3)\ninput_rev_anneal = rc(inp[175:210])\n\nprimers = [\n    (\"input_fwd\",  oh_j4,     input_fwd_anneal),\n    (\"input_rev\",  rc(oh_j1), input_rev_anneal),\n    (\"egfp_fwd\",   oh_j1,     egfp_fwd_anneal),\n    (\"egfp_rev\",   rc(oh_j2), egfp_rev_anneal),\n    (\"flag_fwd\",   oh_j2,     flag_fwd_anneal),\n    (\"flag_rev\",   rc(oh_j3), flag_rev_anneal),\n    (\"snap_fwd\",   oh_j3,     snap_fwd_anneal),\n    (\"snap_rev\",   rc(oh_j4), snap_rev_anneal),\n]\n\nprint(\"\\n=== Primer Design ===\")\nprint(f\"{'Name':<12} {'OH':<6} {'Anneal Len':<12} {'Tm':>6}  {'Full Primer Len':>15}  {'Full Seq'}\")\nfor name, oh, anneal in primers:\n    full_seq = PREFIX + oh + anneal\n    tm = get_tm(anneal)\n    print(f\"{name:<12} {oh:<6} {len(anneal):<12} {tm:>6.1f}  {len(full_seq):>15}  {full_seq}\")\n\n# Check pair differences\npairs = [\n    (\"egfp\", \"egfp_fwd\", \"egfp_rev\"),\n    (\"flag\", \"flag_fwd\", \"flag_rev\"),\n    (\"snap\", \"snap_fwd\", \"snap_rev\"),\n    (\"input\", \"input_fwd\", \"input_rev\"),\n]\n\nprint(\"\\n=== Tm Pair Differences ===\")\nprimer_dict = {name: (oh, anneal) for name, oh, anneal in primers}\nfor pair_name, fwd_name, rev_name in pairs:\n    fwd_tm = get_tm(primer_dict[fwd_name][1])\n    rev_tm = get_tm(primer_dict[rev_name][1])\n    diff = abs(fwd_tm - rev_tm)\n    status = \"✓\" if diff <= 5.0 else \"✗\"\n    print(f\"  {pair_name}: fwd={fwd_tm:.1f}, rev={rev_tm:.1f}, diff={diff:.1f} {status}\")\n\n# Check annealing length constraints\nprint(\"\\n=== Annealing Length Constraints (15-45 nt) ===\")\nfor name, oh, anneal in primers:\n    status = \"✓\" if 15 <= len(anneal) <= 45 else \"✗\"\n    print(f\"  {name}: {len(anneal)} nt {status}\")\n\n# Check Tm constraints (58-72)\nprint(\"\\n=== Tm Constraints (58-72°C) ===\")\nfor name, oh, anneal in primers:\n    tm = get_tm(anneal)\n    status = \"✓\" if 58 <= tm <= 72 else \"✗\"\n    print(f\"  {name}: {tm:.1f}°C {status}\")\n\n# Verify overhangs are unique and non-palindromic\nprint(\"\\n=== Overhang Validation ===\")\nall_oh = [oh_j1, oh_j2, oh_j3, oh_j4]\nall_oh_rc = [rc(oh) for oh in all_oh]\nprint(f\"Overhangs: {all_oh}\")\nprint(f\"RCs: {all_oh_rc}\")\nprint(f\"All unique: {len(set(all_oh)) == 4}\")\nprint(f\"No palindromes: {all(oh != rc(oh) for oh in all_oh)}\")\nprint(f\"No RC overlap: {not any(r in all_oh for r in all_oh_rc)}\")\nPYEOF","description":"Design and validate all primers","timeout":60000},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":129403,"cache_read_input_tokens":0,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":129403,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":26,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"466a4df5-a3ef-4f40-b893-7963dfba6704","uuid":"c098f7ce-45db-4df8-aa99-8fc8e36ebea6"}

'tca' from FLAG[84:87], 'g' from SNAP[3].\n# J4 OH = 'gtta'. 'gt' from SNAP[544:546], 'ta' from input[687:689].\n# So SNAP body between overhangs: SNAP[4:544] = 540 nt\nsnap_body = snap[4:544]  # 540 nt\n\n# VECTOR body: input[689:2727] + input[0:210]\n# J4 OH includes input[687:689]='ta', J1 OH includes input[210:213]='atg'\n# Vector body between overhangs: input[689:2727] + input[0:210]\nvector_body = inp[689:] + inp[:210]  # 2038 + 210 = 2248 nt\n\n# Assembled product (linear representation, starting from J1):\nassembled = oh_j1 + egfp_body + oh_j2 + flag_body + oh_j3 + snap_body + oh_j4 + vector_body\n\nprint(f\"Assembled length: {len(assembled)}\")\nprint(f\"Output length: {len(out)}\")\n\n# The output starts at a specific position in the circular product\n# Output starts with: actcttcctttttcaat...\n# Vector body starts with: input[689:] = 'atgaggatccc...'\n# Vector body ending: input[:210]\n# The output starts from the beginning of the input vector (position 0)\n\n# In our assembled product (starting from J1 = position 210 in output):\n# assembled[0:4] = oh_j1 = 'atga' = output[210:214]\n\n# The output is a different linearization of the same circular molecule\n# output starts at position 0 = within the vector body\n# assembled starts at position 210 = at J1\n\n# To compare: rotate the assembled product\n# output[210:] + output[:210] should equal assembled\nrotated_output = out[210:] + out[:210]\nprint(f\"Rotated output length: {len(rotated_output)}\")\nprint(f\"Match: {assembled == rotated_output}\")\n\nif assembled != rotated_output:\n    # Find first mismatch\n    for i in range(min(len(assembled), len(rotated_output))):\n        if assembled[i] != rotated_output[i]:\n            print(f\"First mismatch at position {i}:\")\n            print(f\"  assembled[{i-5}:{i+10}] = {assembled[max(0,i-5):i+10]}\")\n            print(f\"  rotated[{i-5}:{i+10}] = {rotated_output[max(0,i-5):i+10]}\")\n            break\nelse:\n    print(\"✓ Assembly correctly reconstructs the output sequence!\")\n\n# Also verify each annealing region is found in its template\nprint(\"\\n=== Annealing Region Verification ===\")\nanneal_checks = [\n    (\"egfp_fwd\", egfp, egfp[4:24], \"fwd\"),\n    (\"egfp_rev\", egfp, egfp[691:712], \"rev\"),  # template orientation\n    (\"flag_fwd\", flag, flag[5:24], \"fwd\"),\n    (\"flag_rev\", flag, flag[61:84], \"rev\"),\n    (\"snap_fwd\", snap, snap[4:27], \"fwd\"),\n    (\"snap_rev\", snap, snap[525:544], \"rev\"),\n    (\"input_fwd\", inp, inp[689:708], \"fwd\"),\n    (\"input_rev\", inp, inp[175:210], \"rev\"),\n]\n\nfor name, template, anneal_template, direction in anneal_checks:\n    found = anneal_template in template\n    pos = template.find(anneal_template)\n    print(f\"  {name}: annealing region found in template at pos {pos}: {found}\")\nPYEOF","description":"Verify assembly reconstruction matches output"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2936,"cache_read_input_tokens":129403,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":2936,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":8,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"466a4df5-a3ef-4f40-b893-7963dfba6704","uuid":"992ebae5-b4f8-4b2d-a9b0-7e8be262cd1f"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01P3X3iasmutnL5Jz9idGhsA","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01D4ExVK2fUk4iGVkLzcHogj","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"python3 << 'PYEOF'\nimport subprocess\n\ndef get_tm(seq):\n    result = subprocess.run(\n        ['oligotm', '-tp', '1', '-sc', '1', '-mv', '50', '-dv', '2', '-n', '0.8', '-d', '500', seq.upper()],\n        capture_output=True, text=True\n    )\n    return float(result.stdout.strip())\n\n# Read and verify primers.fasta\nprimers = {}\nwith open(\"primers.fasta\") as f:\n    name = None\n    for line in f:\n        line = line.strip()\n        if line.startswith(\">\"):\n            name = line[1:]\n        elif name:\n            primers[name] = line\n            name = None\n\nprint(f\"Number of primers: {len(primers)}\")\nprint(f\"Number of lines: {sum(1 for _ in open('primers.fasta'))}\")\nprint(f\"Blank lines: {sum(1 for line in open('primers.fasta') if line.strip() == '')}\")\n\n# Verify 8 primers, no blank lines, correct headers\nprint(\"\\n=== Final Primer Summary ===\")\nprint(f\"{'Name':<12} {'Total Len':>9} {'Anneal Len':>10} {'Tm':>6} {'Anneal Seq'}\")\n\n# Extract annealing regions (everything after the 17-char prefix: ggctacggtctca + 4nt overhang)\nprefix_len = 13  # ggctacggtctca\noh_len = 4\n\nfor name, seq in primers.items():\n    anneal = seq[prefix_len + oh_len:]\n    tm = get_tm(anneal)\n    print(f\"{name:<12} {len(seq):>9} {len(anneal):>10} {tm:>6.1f} {anneal}\")\n\n# Verify pair Tm differences\nprint(\"\\n=== Pair Tm Differences ===\")\npairs = [(\"input\", \"input_fwd\", \"input_rev\"), (\"egfp\", \"egfp_fwd\", \"egfp_rev\"),\n         (\"flag\", \"flag_fwd\", \"flag_rev\"), (\"snap\", \"snap_fwd\", \"snap_rev\")]\n\nall_pass = True\nfor pname, fwd, rev in pairs:\n    fwd_tm = get_tm(primers[fwd][prefix_len + oh_len:])\n    rev_tm = get_tm(primers[rev][prefix_len + oh_len:])\n    diff = abs(fwd_tm - rev_tm)\n    ok = diff <= 5.0\n    if not ok: all_pass = False\n    print(f\"  {pname}: fwd={fwd_tm:.1f}°C, rev={rev_tm:.1f}°C, |diff|={diff:.1f}°C {'✓' if ok else '✗'}\")\n\n# Verify all Tm in range\nprint(\"\\n=== All Tm in Range (58-72°C) ===\")\nfor name, seq in primers.items():\n    anneal = seq[prefix_len + oh_len:]\n    tm = get_tm(anneal)\n    ok = 58 <= tm <= 72\n    if not ok: all_pass = False\n    print(f\"  {name}: {tm:.1f}°C {'✓' if ok else '✗'}\")\n\n# Verify annealing lengths\nprint(\"\\n=== Annealing Lengths (15-45 nt) ===\")\nfor name, seq in primers.items():\n    anneal = seq[prefix_len + oh_len:]\n    ok = 15 <= len(anneal) <= 45\n    if not ok: all_pass = False\n    print(f\"  {name}: {len(anneal)} nt {'✓' if ok else '✗'}\")\n\nprint(f\"\\n{'ALL CHECKS PASSED!' if all_pass else 'SOME CHECKS FAILED!'}\")\n\n# Show the file\nprint(\"\\n=== primers.fasta content ===\")\nwith open(\"primers.fasta\") as f:\n    print(f.read())\nPYEOF","description":"Final verification of primers.fasta"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":339,"cache_read_input_tokens":134512,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":339,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":5,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"466a4df5-a3ef-4f40-b893-7963dfba6704","uuid":"b314bdd4-7cd6-49e7-a02a-ff1f364b176e"}
